description: arXiv:2607.16131v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal Scientific Claim Verification (MSCV) requires models to verify scientific claims using visually grounded evidence from papers, including figures, tables, charts, and textual context. However, existing methods often fail because they struggle to locate decisive visual evidence, accurately read structured scientific visuals, and integra...
author: Binglin Zhou, Peng Shi, Ryo Kamoi, Nan Zhang, Rui Zhang
